title: Why Elon Musk says ASML is the greatest company in Europe
summary: For Elon Musk’s ambitious Terafab project in Texas to be successful, Musk is going to need  lots of ASML’s industry-leading lithography machines.

title: Nvidia, Meta and SLB rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.
